measurements.claim: The twentieth-wave packet focuses only on YouTube, Reddit, and social/blog surfaces, leaving funding and GitHub out of scope for the active wave.
evidence: TWENTIETH-WAVE-SOCIAL-BLOG-COMMENT-QUEUE-2026-07-02.md purpose states YouTube, Reddit, and other social/blog surfaces
the purpose states funding and GitHub are out of scope for this wave unless an active reply needs response

measurements.claim: The packet includes exact, non-identical comment drafts for Reddit, YouTube, and blog/social targets with URLs and reasons.
evidence: Reddit targets R15-R19 include URL, reason, and text
YouTube targets Y15-Y20 include URL, reason, and text
Blog/social targets B1-B6 include URL, reason, and text
drafts vary by target and do not duplicate the same comment

measurements.claim: The packet requires exact confirmation before public posting and explicitly says not to claim posting until the public side effect completes.
evidence: Posting rule says comments are ready for exact confirmation and authenticated posting
Posting rule says do not claim they were posted until the public side effect actually completes
Posting Confirmation Template requires destinations and exact text

measurements.claim: The recommended first run contains eight comments across Reddit, YouTube, and blog surfaces and avoids link-heavy/link-spraying behavior.
evidence: Recommended First Run lists R15, R16, R17, Y15, Y16, Y17, B3, and B5
Current Social Posture says prefer no-link comments unless explicitly relevant
recommended first run does not include repository-link variants
